meaning: n.阿帕奇分族的印第安人
examples: When all the other children refused to play Lone Ranger with who was it that was always your Tonto?
Patterns in Nature: Flowers The flower of a claret cup cactus glows amid Tonto National Forest in Arizona.
In 2013, the Lone Ranger was remade into a movie starring Johnny Depp as Tonto, the Lone Ranger's Native American partner.
The story of westward expansion as told from Tonto's perspective isn't entirely accurate historically.
"Tonto" is one of the long ones, but it wastes no time in pulling its components into a stomping climax.
